hero.title: Image, intelligence and structure.
hero.subtitle: At the service of a presence that matters.
hero.body: CerfLand Media is not a communication agency in the ordinary sense. It is a house of creative direction, cinematic production and intelligent systems designed to build stronger, more readable, more durable presences.

position.heading: We don't seek to produce more noise.
position.body: Some companies need visibility. Others need bearing, authority, coherence and a language capable of carrying their real level. That is precisely where we intervene.
position.sub: CerfLand Media builds assets, films, systems and continuity devices capable of making a brand better read, its value better understood, its level better held.

poles.heading: Our poles
poles.subtitle: A complete ecosystem at the service of your presence

items.title: Enterprises
items.desc: For structures that need a more just, more readable and better structured presence.

items.title: Special Projects
items.desc: For films, campaigns and rare productions that demand more than ordinary execution.

items.title: AI Agents
items.desc: For structures that want to transform AI into real, governed operational capacity.

items.title: Active™
items.desc: NFC cards, connected media and intelligent contact points.

items.title: Elvara
items.desc: Memory, portrait and presence editions designed as rare objects.

items.title: Families
items.desc: Memories and transmissions that deserve tact, structure and dignity.

items.title: CerfLand Club
items.desc: The selective circle. An ecosystem of relationship, trust and level.

method.heading: Our way of working
method.body: Every mission begins with serious reading. Before producing, we seek to understand what must be protected, clarified, elevated, systematized, and what must remain discreet. Only then do we build the right form.

cta.heading: Let's talk about what your presence must really produce.
cta.body: Not a demonstration. Not a sales pitch. A clear exchange, to understand your situation, your level of requirement and the right form.

hero.title: Brand assets. Useful systems. A presence that holds.
hero.subtitle: A company doesn't just need to be visible. It needs to be readable, credible, coherent and continuously supported.

problem.heading: We intervene where simply 'doing more' is no longer enough.

items.title: The brand appears below its real level
items.desc: The image exists, but without real authority or coherence.

items.title: Messages are scattered
items.desc: Media don't work together. Continuity depends on urgency.

items.title: Communication creates no cumulative value
items.desc: Much visible activity, but no presence that installs itself.

pricing.heading: Packages
pricing.note: All prices are excl. VAT. Monaco / Côte d'Azur / premium contexts.

tiers.name: The Spark

tiers.name: The Narrative
tiers.desc: To build a denser, more coherent presence.

tiers.name: Prestige
tiers.desc: For established structures at their real positioning level.
features: Continuity capable of supporting premium image

tiers.name: The Empire
tiers.desc: For houses, groups and very high-level structures.
features: Presence treated as a strategic function

hero.title: When a brand, a place or a moment deserves more than ordinary.
hero.subtitle: Some projects don't fall under ordinary communication. They demand another density, another precision, another symbolic reach.

tiers.name: Cinema Spot 30s
tiers.desc: Strategic reading, concept, production, post-production, final delivery.

tiers.name: Cinema Spot 60s
tiers.desc: For projects that need more narrative space.

tiers.name: Manifesto Film 3–5min
tiers.desc: A reference film to give a visible backbone.

tiers.name: Grand Format 3D 30s
tiers.desc: For sculptural, distinctive and spectacular impact without vulgarity.

hero.title: An operated intelligence. Connected to reality. Governed with precision.
hero.subtitle: At CerfLand Media, an AI Agent is not a conversational gadget. It is a scripted, connected, governed and maintained system.

whatIs.heading: Not a chatbot. A system.
points: It knows its role, limits, tone and rules
It qualifies, orients, filters, responds and triggers actions
It integrates into a real architecture: site, WhatsApp, CRM, agenda
It passes to the human when necessary
It does not claim to replace human judgment

hero.title: The rare pole of memory, portrait and emotional object.
hero.subtitle: Neither gadget nor ordinary album. An edition composed of presence.

items.desc: On what remains when everything else disappears. Memory, places, languages of silence.
Passages, beginnings, ruptures. What it truly means to begin something.
What light reveals — in photography, architecture, thought and the body.
Against urgency and superficiality. In praise of what takes time and endures.

hero.title: Memories and transmissions that deserve tact, structure and dignity.
hero.subtitle: The pole dedicated to childhood trajectories, educational structures and memory contexts that demand more than ordinary.

hero.title: The selective circle.
hero.subtitle: Not an open community. An ecosystem of relationship, trust and level.
